title: G@shuwriy #1651
definition:
Geshuri or Geshurites = see Geshur

 1) inhabitants of Geshur
 2) a tribe in south Palestine of or near the Philistines
nasbUsage:
Definition: Geshuri or Geshurites = see Geshur

 1) inhabitants of Geshur
 2) a tribe in south Palestine of or near the Philistines

    NASB:  inhab. of Geshur, also a people S. of Philistia
